findings: Conformer faithfully implemented: block order 0.5*FFN1->MHSA->Conv->0.5*FFN2->LayerNorm matches Sec 2.4; conv module LN->PW(x2)->GLU(dim=1)->DWConv(k7,pad3,groups=d)->BN1d->Swish->PW->Dropout correct; FFN LN->Linear(4d)->Swish->Dropout->Linear->Dropout correct; pre-norm self-attn q=k=v correct. No correctness bugs; executed (556->368) in train/eval for B=1,2, all finite. Multi-level output var-major (6x60) matches target layout. Deliberate climate adaptations (no conv-subsampling/decoder/SpecAugment, absolute learned positional encoding, structure-matched heads) sound and non-breaking. Minor: output_dim stored but unused (hardcoded 368 by construction) — fine for this harness.
